allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem F:\\projects\\bonghwang-memories -Force | Select-Object Name, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($g = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "gh: " + $g.Source } else { "gh: NOT FOUND" }; $git = Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($git\) { "git: " + $git.Source } else { "git: NOT FOUND" })

PowerShell(git init -q F:\\projects\\bonghwang-memories; git -C F:\\projects\\bonghwang-memories remote add origin https://github.com/new-generation25/bonghwang-memories.git; git -C F:\\projects\\bonghwang-memories fetch origin --depth=1; if \($?\) { git -C F:\\projects\\bonghwang-memories remote set-head origin -a; $b = \(git -C F:\\projects\\bonghwang-memories symbolic-ref --short refs/remotes/origin/HEAD\) -replace '^origin/',''; "default branch: $b"; git -C F:\\projects\\bonghwang-memories checkout -B $b --track origin/$b })
